Home → Discography → Only One

Only One

2006 · 7th Sign

A rare limited-press release of only 1000 copies, a companion piece to For the Fans Vol. 1 from 2005, continuing Bizzy's direct-to-fan approach before traditional album distribution. Consists of productions and collaborations with lesser-known artists, reflecting a turbulent period in Bizzy’s life associated with the widely discussed radio interview on Houston station KPFT FM. One of the rarest physical releases in his solo catalog.

"Comin´ to the door you can hear him Knock, Knock, I Heard that he was homeless."

— Knock, Knock
01 The Poem produced by Platinum Child —
02 Have You Ever Been Lonely Remix Pt.2 produced by Platinum Child —
03 It's Alright produced by Platinum Child feat. Plexx & Black Mike —
04 Oh, Let's Go produced by Platinum Child feat. Platinum Child —
05 The Only One produced by Platinum Child —
06 I'm The One produced by Platinum Child —
07 The Message produced by Platinum Child —
08 I Don't Think You Want To produced by Platinum Child —
09 Knock, Knock produced by Platinum Child —
10 Purple Hearted produced by Platinum Child —
11 A Letter Remix produced by Lab Ox & Titan —
12 Half Breed MC produced by Platinum Child feat. Plexx & Half-Fiction —
13 Bone Yard produced by Platinum Child feat. J Angel —
14 Hey Family produced by Platinum Child —
15 To Be Or Not To Be produced by Platinum Child —
16 I Need Bail produced by Lab Ox —
17 Priceless Remix produced by Lab Ox —
18 Have You Ever Been Lonely Remix Pt.3 produced by Platinum Child —
